scripts.build: cd backend && bun run build && cd ../web && bun run build
scripts.test: cd backend && npx vitest run && cd ../web && npx vitest run
scripts.lint: cd backend && npx eslint src/ && cd ../web && npx eslint src/
scripts.docker: docker build -t openhive -f deployments/Dockerfile . && docker compose -f deployments/docker-compose.yml up
scripts.smoke: cd backend && npx vitest run src/phase-gates/
